17.reason: [Error: scanf format specifier is missing the '%' character. It should be "%d" instead of "d". This causes scanf to fail to read input, leading to an infinite loop or undefined behavior.]

reasons.buggy-deepseek-chat-1: 1.0 , reason:  [Error: scanf format specifier is missing the '%' character. It should be "%d" instead of "d". This causes scanf to fail to read input, leading to an infinite loop or undefined behavior.]
reasons.buggy-deepseek-chat-2: 1.0 , reason:  [Error: scanf format string is "d" instead of "%d", causing no input to be read, leading to infinite loop or undefined behavior]
reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-2: 1.0 , reason:  scanf格式字符串错误，应为"%d"，导致读取失败并陷入死循环，引发TLE
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-1: 1.0 , reason:  The format string "d" is incorrect; it should be "%d". This causes scanf to fail to read the integer properly, likely leading to an infinite loop or undefined behavior, resulting in Time Limit Exceeded.
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-2: 1.0 , reason:  The format string "d" is invalid; it should be "%d". This causes scanf to fail to read input correctly, likely leading to an infinite loop or undefined behavior, resulting in Time Limit Exceeded.
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-1: 1.0 , reason:  [The format string "d" is missing the percent sign; it should be "%d". This causes scanf to not read integers properly, leading to an infinite loop and thus Time Limit Exceeded.]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-2: 1.0 , reason:  [Incorrect format specifier in scanf: "d" should be "%d". This causes scanf to fail to read integers properly, leading to an infinite loop and thus Time Limit Exceeded.]
